title: The Man in Selya's Life
original_title: Ang Lalaki sa Buhay ni Selya
overview: Selya is disappointed with Bobby who only wants sex but no real relationship nor marriage. So she leaves and decides to marry the gay Ramon who, she is convinced, is definitely different.
